humanized_abstract: The new edition of International Organization is a new textbook on international organizations published by Zhejiang University Press. It is an introduction to the study of international organizations in the context of International Relations, which is expected to serve as learning materials for undergraduate students of International Relations in China.

document.output: The new edition of International Organization is a new textbook on international organizations published by Zhejiang University Press. It is an introduction to the study of international organizations in the context of International Relations, which is expected to serve as learning materials for undergraduate students of International Relations in China.
